variants: Sofia Rocafuerte was born in Outrider Point, where her early interests in technology and innovation began to flourish. Her contributions to the field have earned her the esteemed Sanctum Crescent Citation, recognizing her exceptional talent and commitment to innovation. In her leisure time, Sofia enjoys being an active member of the Willowwood Archivists, a society dedicated to preserving and sharing knowledge.
